name: StateHouse Holdings Inc.
description: StateHouse Holdings Inc. is a vertically integrated omni-channel cannabis company primarily focused on the California market. The enterprise operates across the entire cannabis value chain, including cultivation, nursery, manufacturing, distribution, and retail operations. With a portfolio of well-known brands such as Harborside, Kingpen, and Urbn Leaf, the company provides a comprehensive range of cannabis products for both medical and adult-use consumers. Founded in 2006, StateHouse is recognized as one of the oldest and most established cannabis operators in California, dedicated to making cannabis safe and accessible through its extensive network of dispensaries and production facilities.
